steps.title: Spot the material difference
steps.content: The question asks for a sentence that emphasizes a difference between the two sculptures. The relevant notes say Open Ended is made of weathering steel, while Strike: To Roberta and Rudy is made of hot-rolled steel.

steps.title: Choose the comparison sentence
steps.content: Choice A emphasizes that both works are large metal sculptures by the same artist. Choice B mentions only Strike: To Roberta and Rudy. Choice C mentions only Open Ended. The sentence that compares their different kinds of steel best fits the goal. The answer is D.
